task_completion.description: Verify the spatial calibration was set correctly on the original image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Properties' dialog box in Fiji with Pixel width: 1.0, Pixel height: 1.0, Voxel depth: 1.5, and Unit of length: mm. Alternatively, look at the image window title bar to see dimensions listed in 'mm' instead of 'pixels'.

task_completion.description: Verify the axial line profile was generated and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a line drawn across the brain in the axial view and a 'Plot of t1-head' window showing an intensity graph. Also look for a save dialog or terminal command saving 'axial_profile.csv'.

task_completion.description: Verify the image was resliced into a coronal view and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Reslice' dialog with 'Top' selected, a new image window showing a coronal (front-to-back) cross-section of the brain, and evidence of saving it as 'coronal_stack.tif'.

task_completion.description: Verify the image was resliced into a sagittal view and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Reslice' dialog with 'Left' selected, a new image window showing a sagittal (side profile) cross-section of the brain, and evidence of saving it as 'sagittal_stack.tif'.

task_completion.description: Verify the coronal line profile was generated and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a vertical line drawn on the coronal stack image, a 'Plot' window showing the intensity graph for this line, and evidence of saving 'coronal_profile.csv'.

task_completion.description: Verify the orthogonal montage was created and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a composite image window displaying three different brain views (Axial, Coronal, Sagittal) side-by-side, and evidence of saving it as 'orthogonal_montage.png'.

task_completion.description: Verify the measurement report text file was created with the required information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor window open showing 'measurement_report.txt' containing the measured brain width in mm, the dimensions of the coronal and sagittal stacks, and the calibration values (1.0x1.0x1.5 mm).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Fiji GUI to perform the image processing tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interaction with Fiji menus (Image > Properties, Image > Stacks > Reslice, Analyze > Plot Profile) rather than just running a pre-written script in the terminal to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Ensure the resliced images are genuine anatomical views.
integrity.visual_evidence: The coronal and sagittal windows should look like actual brain scans (recognizable structures) and not empty black windows, random noise, or identical copies of the axial slice.

integrity.description: Ensure the plot profiles are generated from actual image data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Plot Profile' windows should display a fluctuating curve representing pixel intensities across the drawn line, not a flat line or an empty graph.
